title: Yettel Transit
apps_data_note: 20 GB for two selected apps only — not general internet. 500 MB EU roaming included.
why: 100 GB real general-purpose data for 15 days at €10.26. Best heavy-data option for Serbia short trips. Includes 500 MB EU roaming. Online eSIM, activate before arrival.
why_ru: 100 ГБ реального трафика на 15 дней — €10.26. Лучший вариант для интенсивных пользователей на коротких поездках. Включает 500 МБ роуминга в ЕС.
warnings: Only 0.5 GB EU roaming — no Western Balkans roaming
App/social 20 GB is app-specific
notes: Yettel Transit 15. 100 GB unrestricted + 20 GB app/social. 0.5 GB EU roaming only — NOT WB roaming.

title: A1 Welcome SIM

extension_options.note: Top-up 500 RSD (~€4.27) extends to 15 days total
Top-up 1500 RSD (~€12.82) extends to 30 days total

friction_notes: Not renewable — extend via top-up only
why: 200 GB real general-purpose data for 7 days at €8.27 — exceptional value for heavy users. Real Serbian number. Online eSIM, activate before arrival. Extendable to 15 or 30 days via top-up.
why_ru: 200 ГБ реального трафика за 7 дней — €8.27. Отличный вариант для активных пользователей. Реальный сербский номер. Онлайн-eSIM. Можно продлить до 15 или 30 дней через пополнение.
warnings: Exact WB roaming fair-use allowance unpublished — verify before relying on Balkans roaming
eSIM availability unverified
200 GB domestic claim needs official confirmation
notes: A1 Welcome SIM. 200 GB domestic at max speed. WB roaming via RLAH — exact fair-use allowance NOT confirmed.

title: Vodafone Albania Tourist 30
why: Best Albania option. Buy at TIA airport — takes ~5 minutes with passport. 20 GB real data. Physical SIM only.
why_ru: Лучший вариант в Албании. Покупка в аэропорту TIA — ~5 минут с паспортом. 20 ГБ реального трафика.
warnings: Physical SIM only — no eSIM
Remote online purchase unreliable
No roaming included
notes: Best Albania option. Airport purchase at TIA. Physical SIM only.

title: Vodafone Albania 7-Day
why: Easiest Albania option. No registration, no passport. Buy at TIA airport and go. 8 GB for 7 days.
why_ru: Самый простой вариант в Албании. Без регистрации, без паспорта. Купите в аэропорту TIA и поезжайте.
warnings: Physical SIM only
No roaming
notes: Simplest Albania option. No registration needed.

title: One Tourist Ultra
friction_notes: eSIM needs store/airport visit in practice
why: 100 GB for 21 days. Best heavy-data option in Albania. eSIM listed but usually requires airport or store activation.
why_ru: 100 ГБ на 21 день. Лучший вариант для тех, кто много использует данные в Албании.
warnings: eSIM activation commonly requires in-person visit
Non-renewable
Passport required
notes: 100 GB for heavy users. eSIM on paper but store visit usually needed.

title: Airalo Albania 5 GB / 30 days
warnings: No local phone number
Data-only
notes: Instant setup benchmark for Albania. Useful if airport SIM purchase isn't possible.

title: One Tourist 15
why: Best short-trip eSIM in Montenegro. 500 GB + 8.5 GB W. Balkans roaming. Online activation.
why_ru: Лучший eSIM для короткой поездки в Черногорию. 500 ГБ + 8.5 ГБ роуминга по Западным Балканам.
warnings: No voice calls or SMS — data only
500 GB is large but NOT unlimited
notes: One Tourist 15. 500 GB domestic + 8.5 GB WB roaming quota. Data only. Includes 3 months HBO Max.

title: One Tourist 20
why: 1 TB + 11 GB Balkans roaming for €20. Smarter than buying two 15-day plans — saves €10.
why_ru: 1 ТБ + 11 ГБ роуминга по Балканам за €20. Выгоднее, чем два 15-дневных плана — экономия €10.
warnings: No voice calls or SMS — data only
notes: One Tourist 20. 1 TB domestic + 11 GB WB quota. 30d. Data only. Includes 3 months HBO Max.

title: One Tourist 25 (Unlimited)
why: Unlimited data + 13.5 GB Balkans roaming. Best for heavy users in Montenegro.
why_ru: Безлимитный трафик + 13.5 ГБ роуминга. Лучший вариант для активных пользователей в Черногории.
warnings: Unlimited domestic FUP threshold not confirmed
Hotspot behavior under FUP unverified
No voice calls or SMS
notes: One Tourist 25. Unlimited domestic (FUP not published) + 13.5 GB WB. 30d. Data only. 3 months HBO Max.

title: Telekom Montenegro Tourist
data_gb_total_display: 500 GB domestic (shared quota in WB zone)
why: English tourist page. QR code sent by email. Good for extending with add-ons.
why_ru: Английская страница для туристов. QR-код отправляется на email. Хорошо расширяется дополнительными пакетами.
warnings: WB uses shared domestic quota — overage: €9.32/GB after exhaustion
Use ZB STOP INTERNET to 14555 to prevent unexpected WB charges
notes: Telekom Pripejd. 500 GB + 500 min + 500 SMS. WB shared home quota. Incoming WB calls free. SMS control: ZB DATA to 14555.

title: m:tel Super Tourist (45 days)
data_gb_total_display: Unlimited domestic (FUP) + WB via fair-use + 10 GB WB after first top-up
why: Best for 45-day stays. Unlimited data. Costs less than combining shorter plans. No Balkans roaming.
why_ru: Лучший вариант для 45 дней. Безлимитный трафик. Дешевле комбинации коротких планов. Без балканского роуминга.
warnings: Unlimited domestic FUP threshold not confirmed
Initial WB is fair-use only — first top-up adds 10 GB WB6
Previous wb_cap=8.0 was incorrect — corrected to None (fair-use, not quota)
notes: m:tel Super Tourist. Unlimited domestic (FUP unconfirmed). WB via fair-use. First top-up: +10 GB WB6. Premium 45d.

why: Genuine tourist eSIM with English page. Airport purchase at SJJ. Local Bosnian number.
why_ru: Настоящий туристический eSIM с английской страницей. Покупка в аэропорту SJJ. Местный номер.
warnings: Passport required
notes: BH Telecom genuine tourist eSIM. English tourist page available. Western Balkans roaming included. English tourist page available.

title: BH Telecom Tourist XL
why: 30 GB for 30 days. eSIM online. Best Bosnia option for longer stays.
why_ru: 30 ГБ на 30 дней. Онлайн eSIM. Лучший вариант для длительных поездок в Боснию.
warnings: Passport required
notes: 30 GB / 30 days. eSIM available online. Western Balkans roaming included. English tourist page available.

why: 15 GB eSIM for €8. Online purchase. Best tourist option in North Macedonia.

warnings: Passport required
notes: Telekom MK tourist eSIM. Online purchase available.

warnings: Passport required

title: Vodafone CallYa Start
friction_notes: Online process — no store visit needed
why: Cheapest Vodafone entry plan for Germany. 2 GB + EU roaming. Online eSIM. Identity verification online — hotel address accepted.
why_ru: Самый дешёвый вариант входного уровня Vodafone для Германии. 2 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС. Онлайн eSIM. Верификация личности онлайн — адрес отеля принимается.
warnings: Identity verification required — takes ~10 minutes online
Activation may take several hours after verification
notes: Entry-level CallYa. 2 GB + EU roaming. Online eSIM delivery. VideoIdent — hotel address accepted.

title: Vodafone CallYa Allnet M
friction_notes: Online process — no store visit needed
why: Best all-round German prepaid for tourists. 50 GB + EU roaming, auto-renews. Online eSIM with identity verification — hotel address accepted. Most tourist-friendly setup in Germany.
why_ru: Лучший немецкий предоплатный тариф для туристов. 50 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС, автопродление. Онлайн eSIM с верификацией — адрес отеля принимается.
warnings: Identity verification required — online VideoIdent (~10 min)
Activation may take several hours after verification
notes: 50 GB + EU roaming. Auto-renews. Hotel address works for VideoIdent. Most tourist-friendly German option.

title: Vodafone CallYa Allnet L
friction_notes: Online process — no store visit needed
why: 100 GB + EU roaming for heavy users. Same online onboarding as other CallYa plans. Best for long Germany stays or heavy hotspot use.
why_ru: 100 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС для активных пользователей. Та же онлайн-активация. Лучший вариант для длительного пребывания или активного использования.
warnings: Identity verification required — online VideoIdent (~10 min)
Activation may take several hours after verification
notes: 100 GB + EU roaming. Auto-renews. Best for heavy-data Germany stays.

title: O2 Prepaid M (20 GB)
friction_notes: Continues at reduced speed after data allowance
why: Cheapest German prepaid option. 20 GB + EU roaming at €9.99. Online eSIM, no permanent address required. Continues at reduced speed after 20 GB.
why_ru: Самый дешёвый немецкий предоплатный тариф. 20 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС за €9.99. Онлайн eSIM, постоянный адрес не требуется.
warnings: Identity verification required — online process
Activation may take several hours
notes: 20 GB + EU roaming. No permanent address needed. Continues at low speed after data cap.

title: O2 Prepaid L (40 GB)
why: 40 GB + EU roaming at €14.99. Same online onboarding as O2 M. Good balance of price and data for Germany.
why_ru: 40 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС за €14.99. Та же онлайн-активация. Хороший баланс цены и данных для Германии.
warnings: Identity verification required — online process
notes: 40 GB + EU roaming. No permanent address needed.

title: Telekom MagentaMobil Prepaid M
why: Germany's best network (T-Mobile globally). 33 GB + EU roaming at €9.95. Requires a German address — not suitable for most tourists.
why_ru: Лучшая сеть Германии (T-Mobile глобально). 33 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС за €9.95. Требует немецкий адрес — не подходит для большинства туристов.
warnings: German address required — not suitable for tourists without local address
Identity verification required
notes: Best network in Germany. Requires German address. Best for expats or long-term visitors with local address.

title: Telekom MagentaMobil Prepaid L
why: Germany's best network. 40 GB + EU roaming. Requires German address — best for long-term visitors with a local address.
why_ru: Сильнейшая сеть Германии. 40 ГБ + роуминг по ЕС. Требует немецкий адрес — лучший для долгосрочных посетителей.
warnings: German address required — not suitable for tourists
Identity verification required
notes: Best network quality in Germany. Requires German address.

title: Airalo Germany 10 GB / 30 days
warnings: Verify current price at verify current price at airalo.com
No local German phone number — data-only
notes: Airalo benchmark for Germany. 10 GB / 30 days. Instant setup — no identity check needed.

title: Orange Flex Poland — EU Nomad Setup
friction_notes: Polish number, not local EU country number
Works across EU — not tied to one country
why: Orange Flex Poland is one of the best EU nomad setups available. ~€8/month with ~12 GB EU roaming usable across EU countries, real phone number, app-based activation. No EU residency required. Foreign passports accepted. Significantly cheaper than travel eSIMs for multi-week EU travel.
why_ru: Orange Flex Poland — один из лучших вариантов для цифрового номада в ЕС. ~€8/месяц с ~12 ГБ роуминга по всему ЕС, реальный номер телефона, активация через приложение. Иностранные паспорта принимаются. Значительно дешевле travel eSIM для многонедельных поездок по Европе.
warnings: Polish number — not a local German/French/Italian etc. number
EU roaming cap applies (~12 GB/month roaming allowance)
Not ideal for very heavy EU roaming (hotspot-heavy users)
Onboarding entirely via app — requires smartphone
notes: Orange Flex Poland. 35 PLN/month (≈€8.24). 75 GB domestic + 12.03 GB EU roaming. App-only activation. Foreign passport accepted. No EU residency required.

title: HoT Start
why: HoT Austria HoT Start. 20 GB + 3 GB EU roaming. Online eSIM, foreign passport accepted, no Austrian address required. Good option for multi-country EU travel from Austria base.
why_ru: HoT Austria HoT Start. 20 GB + 3 ГБ роуминга ЕС. Онлайн eSIM, иностранный паспорт принимается, австрийский адрес не нужен.
warnings: EU roaming capped at 3 GB/month
FUP enforcement for non-Austrian residents not fully documented
notes: HoT Austria. 20 GB + 3 GB EU roaming. Foreign passport accepted. Online activation. No Austrian address required.

notes: HoT Austria. 30 GB + 8 GB EU roaming. Foreign passport accepted. Online activation. No Austrian address required.

why: Germany's best network (T-Mobile globally). 80 GB + EU roaming. German address required — not for tourists without a German contact.
